hero.name: Emily Giuliana Scher
hero.tagline: I build scalable architectures. I design intuitive experiences.
hero.description: With over 2 years of experience, I create digital products where code efficiency meets usability. I transform complex ideas into fast, modular, and result-oriented web solutions.

about.subtitle: About Me
about.title: Frontend developer with a product vision
about.p1: I am a Frontend Developer based in Corrientes. I combine my experience in corporate environments, freelance projects, and building products from scratch to create solutions that balance business needs with a seamless experience. My current stack focuses on modern ecosystems like Next.js, React, and TypeScript, backed by Tailwind CSS. I am passionate about clean architecture: I design modular components, implement scalable systems, and maintain code that is a pleasure to read and maintain.
about.p2: Beyond the code editor, I am pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Information Systems to further strengthen my analytical foundations. To recharge away from the screen, I split my time between working out, taking care of my cat Manchita, maintaining my indoor plant ecosystem (there's always room for one more lavender or basil), or relaxing by cooking. I firmly believe that the best technical ideas are born when we achieve a good balance away from the keyboard.

stocknow.title: StockNow
stocknow.description: Multi-tenant commercial management and POS system. Built with Next.js 15 (App Router), Supabase, and Tailwind CSS.
stocknow.ux: Modular frontend architecture and interactive dashboard (shadcn/ui). Interface optimized for real-time data consumption and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) navigation.

frizaditas.title: Frizaditas
frizaditas.description: Custom e-commerce platform and interactive digital catalog for the gastronomic sector.
frizaditas.ux: Conversion-oriented UI/UX design. Optimized checkout flow to reduce cognitive friction, maximizing mobile retention.

syslab.title: Syslab Demo
syslab.description: Proof of Concept (PoC) for a dynamic online catalog for product display and management.
syslab.ux: Implementation of a thematic design system. Clear information architecture that prioritizes visual hierarchy for seamless navigation.

bona.title: Bona Budín
bona.description: Artisanal product e-commerce with dynamic cart integration and optimized WhatsApp checkout.
bona.ux: Mobile-first approach. Clean and intuitive interface that minimizes technical steps for the user and streamlines the end-to-end shopping process.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Whether it's for a freelance project, an opportunity on your team, or just to chat about code and design, I'd love to hear from you.
